---
name: Requirement Review
about: Submit requirements for review and feedback
title: "[REVIEW] "
labels:
  - requirement-review
  - planning
assignees:
  - sobird
---

## Requirement Summary
Brief summary of the requirements being reviewed.

## Detailed Requirements
Provide detailed description of each requirement.

## Acceptance Criteria
List clear acceptance criteria that define when a requirement is met.

## Priority & Timeline
- Priority: High / Medium / Low
- Target Completion: [Date]

## Stakeholders
Who should be involved in this review?

## Questions for Reviewers
Specific questions you'd like reviewers to address.

## Related Documentation
Reference any related documents or specifications.
